meaning: adj.坏人似的,恶棍的,恶毒的,缺德的,罪恶的,腐化堕落的
examples: He was branded by the press as "villainous" and "diabolical."
A more villainous-looking lot never hung in a row on Execution dock.
In The Avengers, the all-star ensemble must thwart a possible world-ending scheme devised by Thor's villainous brother Loki.
The role of a villainous spider-woman named Arachne was scaled back and the Green Goblin's role was enhanced.
Picard's "villainous portrayal of Mr. Picower is unsupported by facts, " says a court document filed by Picower's lawyers.
